title: AgentMessage
description: Typed message exchanged between agents or between an agent and the principal. Every inter-agent communication is logged. See conclave-spec.md §6.5.

threadId.description: Ties a deliberation / task / approval-loop together across many messages.

from.description: Originating role or identity. 'principal' for the human; 'planner' or any sub-agent role otherwise.

payload.description: Type-narrowed by `type`. For task_assignment carries a Task; for task_result carries a TaskResult; for proposal carries an ActionProposal id; etc.

causedBy.description: Parent message id — establishes the provenance chain.

modelBinding.description: If `from` is an LLM-backed agent, the model identifier that generated this message (e.g. 'claude-opus-4.7', 'gpt-5', 'gemini-2.5').
